title: Conversion/Switch of Government of India Securities
description: Government of India announces the conversion/switch of its securities through auction for an aggregate amount of ₹30,000 crore (face value). The security-wise details of the conversion/switch are given as under: Date of Auction Source Securities Amount (FV) of Source Securities (in ₹ crore) Destination Securities June 15, 2026 (Monday) 6.79% GS 2027 (Maturing on May 15, 2027) 4,000 7.50% GS 2034 (Maturing on Aug 10, 2034) 6.64% GS 2027 (Maturing on Dec 09, 2027) 4,000 6.67% GS 2035 (
